title: Hey Crazy Penne Lyrics Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kanom (2012) Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Hey Crazy Penne
SingeR: Ved shankar
Movie: Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kanom (2012)
Music: Ved Shankar
Lyrics: Ved Shankar

Hey Crazy Penne, Yaaradi Neeye
My cutey cuddly littly lovely melody neeye
Hey Crazy Penne, lonely naane
thaniyaa thavikkavittu engae sendari neeye

Unnale nenjinulle tring tring
sonnaale ullukulle something

Idle chatni pola, chenna poori pola
super jodi kedachidumaami
Meri jaani, dil ki rani
ennai nhoki varuvaaya neeyi

Adiye en radhiye oru nodiye nil adiye
Vizhiyaal un vizhiyaal naan vizhundhendi
Irudi hey thirudi nee konjam thaana sirudi
Marudhaani poove ne konjam konjadi

Kaalaiyil ennai kadhal seiya
kaalam muzhudhum kapene naane
Marupadi neeyum maru uyir thandhaai
manathil niraindhai marumamaai neeye

Kuyile koo kuyile aval idame sel adiye
kadhal en kadhal konjam solli vaayen
marupa ava muraipa unna thorathi thorathi adipa
avale en uyirin kadhalliye

Hey Crazy Penne, Yaaradi Neeye
My cutey cuddly littly lovely melody neeye
Hey Crazy Penne, lonely naane
thaniyaa thavikkavittu engae sendari neeye

Unnale nenjinulle tring tring
sonnaale ullukulle something

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Hey Crazy Penne'?

The song expresses the playful and affectionate feelings of love, highlighting the joy of being in a relationship.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kanom'?

The movie revolves around a man who loses his memory and the comedic situations that arise as he tries to regain it, with love playing a central theme.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Hey Crazy Penne'?

The song is sung and composed by Ved Shankar, who also penned the lyrics.

When was 'Hey Crazy Penne' released?

The song was released on July 29, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Hey Crazy Penne', the protagonist expresses his affection and admiration for his beloved, creating a light-hearted and romantic atmosphere. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics reflect the excitement and joy of young love. It serves as a perfect backdrop to the film's comedic narrative, emphasizing the playful dynamics between the characters. Overall, the song evokes feelings of happiness and nostalgia, making it a memorable part of the movie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Hey Crazy Penne from Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kanom is a delightful melody that captures the essence of youthful romance. With Ved Shankar's enchanting vocals and catchy lyrics, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Experience the joy and charm of love through this vibrant track that resonates with every listener.
stanzaMeanings: Hey Crazy Girl, who are you? You are my cute, cuddly, little lovely melody. Hey Crazy Girl, I am lonely, all alone, where are you sending me?
When you say 'tring tring' in my heart, something happens inside.
Oh my beloved, like a sweet rain, you are my dear one.
Like idle chatter, like a nice little snack, did we find a great pair? My dear, will you come to me, the queen of my heart?
Oh my love, in a moment, you are my light. With your eyes, I fell down. Hey, you are a little mischievous, a little playful, my flower, tease me a bit.
Hey Crazy Girl, who are you?
In the morning, will you love me? I will protect you all the time. You are the one who gave me a new life, you are always in my heart.
Oh cuckoo, cuckoo, she is the place, my love, my love, tell me a little, let me speak. She is my life’s story.
Hey Crazy Girl, who are you? You are my cute, cuddly, little lovely melody. Hey Crazy Girl, I am lonely, all alone, where are you sending me?
When you say 'tring tring' in my heart, something happens inside.
Oh my beloved, like a sweet rain, you are my dear one.
